context: Single-project root with: next.config.ts present, tailwind.config.ts present, components/ui/ directory with files, drizzle.config.ts present, vitest.config.ts present, biome.json present, package.json with dependencies 'next', 'tailwindcss', 'drizzle-orm', '@ai-sdk/react', 'better-auth', 'zod', '@tanstack/react-query', 'zustand', 'framer-motion'. No turbo.json or pnpm-workspace.yaml.
expected_behavior: Output is valid JSON to stdout — caller can `jq` it without preprocessing
JSON has at minimum these keys: root, structure, monorepo_tool, languages, frameworks, styling, database, auth, testing, tooling, animation, libraries, confidence

Emits short canonical keys, NOT long-form display names. frameworks=['nextjs'], styling=['tailwind','shadcn'], database=['drizzle']. The agent invoking /bruhs:claim normalizes these to user-facing forms (e.g., 'Next.js') when assembling the final bruhs:state block — derive_stack_rules.py understands both via its synonym map
shadcn appears when components/ui/ OR packages/ui/ is a directory (file marker), regardless of dependency presence

tailwind requires the 'tailwindcss' dependency in package.json (KNOWN LIMITATION: tailwind.config.ts alone is not sufficient — the agent must catch this case via its own ls check, per claim.md Step 2)
drizzle requires the 'drizzle-orm' dependency in package.json (KNOWN LIMITATION: drizzle.config.ts alone is not sufficient)
confidence levels reported per-field: 'high' for explicit deps, 'medium' for file markers only
Errors go to stderr, never stdout — stdout is JSON-clean
Handles missing package.json gracefully (returns partial detection, not crash)
failure_modes: Mixes log messages into stdout, breaking JSON parseability
Drops the deterministic short forms ('nextjs', 'tailwind', 'shadcn', 'drizzle') in favor of inconsistent casing — breaks downstream derive_stack_rules.py synonym matching
Crashes on missing package.json instead of returning a partial result
Reports framework='nextjs' AND framework='vite' when next.config.ts AND a transitive Vite dep are both present — should pick Next.js as the strongest signal
Detects shadcn purely from a 'shadcn' package.json dependency without confirming the components/ui directory exists (false positive)
Hardcodes confidence levels regardless of which signals fired
